data.title: GREEN: Add resolution loop between implementation-plan and decision-maker to SKILL.md
data.description:
## Description

Modify plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md to add the resolution loop step. This is the GREEN task — RED tests from Tasks da65-dea2 and f5da-dcd7 pass after this change.

**Cross-story prerequisites** (handled by sprint orchestrator layer ordering):
- Story 68f6-9130 (proposal generation) must be complete — SKILL.md must already have the Proposal Generation section
- Story a1f3-db49 (agent definition) must be complete — agent file and contract must exist

**Implementation**:
1. Add "### Resolution Loop" section after the Proposal Generation section
2. Dispatch logic: invoke dso:approach-decision-maker agent (subagent_type, model: opus, timeout: 600000) with proposals from the generation step
3. Parse response per contract at plugins/dso/docs/contracts/approach-decision-output.md
4. Accept path: decision-maker selects a proposal → proceed to task drafting with selected approach
5. Revise path: decision-maker counter-proposes → regenerate proposals incorporating feedback → resubmit to decision-maker
6. Escalate path: after 2 revision cycles → present proposals + decision-maker feedback to user
7. Cycle count persistence: write/read /tmp/approach-resolution-<story-id>.json with TTL and cleanup (consistent with preplanning-context pattern)
8. Sprint vs standalone context: sprint = autonomous accept/revise (no user interaction); standalone = user sees rationale at each step
9. Update Process Overview flowchart to include resolution loop

**Remove RED markers** from .test-index:
[test_resolution_loop_section_exists], [test_accept_revise_escalate], [test_cycle_bound], [test_state_file_persistence], [test_user_escalation], [test_decision_maker_dispatch]

## Files to modify
- plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md (modify)
- .test-index (modify — remove RED markers)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Cross-story prerequisite: agent file exists
  Verify: test -f plugins/dso/agents/approach-decision-maker.md
- [ ] Cross-story prerequisite: contract file exists
  Verify: test -f plugins/dso/docs/contracts/approach-decision-output.md
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Contract tests pass GREEN
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-implementation-plan-resolution-loop.sh
- [ ] Resolution loop section exists (awk-scoped)
  Verify: grep -q "### Resolution Loop" plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md
- [ ] References decision-maker agent
  Verify: awk '/^### Resolution Loop/{f=1} f && /^### / && !/^### Resolution Loop/{exit} f{print}' plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md | grep -q "approach-decision-maker"
- [ ] Cycle bound documented
  Verify: awk '/^### Resolution Loop/{f=1} f && /^### / && !/^### Resolution Loop/{exit} f{print}' plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md | grep -qE "2 cycles|max.*2"
- [ ] State file reference
  Verify: awk '/^### Resolution Loop/{f=1} f && /^### / && !/^### Resolution Loop/{exit} f{print}' plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md | grep -q "approach-resolution"
- [ ] RED markers removed
  Verify: ! grep -q "\[test_resolution_loop_section_exists\]" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
